posts.text:
Treasury-market prices are to investors like water to a fish. The assets are so fundamental to global finance that it is tough to imagine a world without them. What happens, then, if Treasuries are no longer deemed riskless?
 https://www.economist.com/special-report/2026/06/01/imagining-a-world-without-a-safe-asset?taid=6a25e532eb9d510001a2bec8&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist
